name: Persona Completeness
description: Does the persona include relevant details such as goals, motivations, and behaviors?

name: CRM Contextualization
description: Is the persona tailored to the specific CRM application and its features?

name: Bias Mitigation
description: Does the persona creation process account for potential biases and ensure diverse perspectives?

name: Practical Applicability
description: Is the persona practical and applicable for sales and business development teams?
